title: Upgrade path: migrate retires the renamed grill skill on existing Instances; doctor flags the orphan
description: update only adds and refreshes template files and never prunes, and migrate has no skill concept, so renaming execution-grill-with-docs orphans the old skill dir in every already-stamped Instance, where the published name still resolves and runs the pre-split behavior. Teach migrate to detect a stamped execution-grill-with-docs dir on an already-stamped Instance and retire it under a versioned, idempotent, location-only migration that never touches a dir the user authored, and have doctor flag the orphan and name migrate as the fix. In scope only if EXEC-091 rules for a rename; if keep-name wins, this issue closes as not-needed.
acceptance_criteria: migrate detects a stamped execution-grill-with-docs dir on an already-stamped Instance and retires or relocates it under a versioned migration id — location-only, idempotent.
migrate never touches a skill dir the user added themselves (only the known published name).
doctor flags the orphaned old skill and names migrate as the fix.
Temp-dir test: stamp the old layout, run update, then migrate leaves only the renamed skill; package-qa PASS.
root_cause: update never prunes template-dropped dirs (cli.js) and migrate knows only records and hooks, so a renamed skill is orphaned on upgrade.
notes: Filed from the adversarial gap-hunt 2026-06-14 (Gap 1, P1). CONFIRMED in scope: EXEC-091 ruled for the rename to execution-epic-grill (2026-06-14), so the orphan/upgrade path must be built.
